metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the qwen-stack plugin from the same repository.

plugins.name: qwen-stack
plugins.description: Locally-hosted Qwen 3.6 as a Claude Code coprocessor — delegate bulk or cheap work to long-lived supervised inference sessions over MCP. Backends include llama.cpp Metal on Apple Silicon and llama.cpp Vulkan on AMD Strix Halo.
